scandal.title: Administrative/Civil Servant Scandal
scandal.description: A record of a scandal involving administrative bodies or individual civil servants.

title.description: The title of the scandal news.

date.description: The date the scandal was reported.

category.description: Whether the scandal is organizational or individual.

description.description: A brief summary of the scandal.

sourceUrl.description: The URL of the news source.

location.description: The prefecture or city where the scandal occurred.

createdAt.description: The time the record was added to the database.

/scandals/{scandalId}.description: A collection of administrative and civil servant scandals collected from news sources.
